articles.title: 'Every person saved is a miracle': Families call to trapped loved ones in region devastated by Venezuela quakes
articles.description: Families keep vigil at buildings where they fear their loved ones are trapped, but face an impossible task to move heavy debris.

articles.title: Thunderstorms delay hundreds of Heathrow and Gatwick flights
articles.description: More than 900 flights have been delayed at Heathrow and Gatwick, many due to stormy weather south of the UK.

articles.title: Burnham will need a Moscow test as well as Makerfield test, says ex-military chief
articles.description: Former Chief of the Defence Staff Admiral Sir Tony Radakin says defence must be a priority for the next prime minister.

articles.title: Are we in for a summer of serial heatwaves?
articles.description: Forecasters have suggested that summer is likely to be warmer than average with an increased chance of more heatwaves, as Simon King explains.
